sections.paragraph:
m. (from the root חָרָה) heat, burning, and concr. of something burning, Psa 58:10.

There is often found the phrase חֲרֹון אַף “heat of anger,” Num 25:4 32:14 1Sa 28:18, and simpl. חָרֹון is used for wrath, Neh 13:18 Psa 2:5. Plur. חֲרֹנִים angers, Psa 88:17.

[חֹרֹון see חֹרֹון בֵּית.]
